name: Apply Imputation
description: Replaces missing values with a pre-computed imputed value. This is the application step only — the imputed_value must be computed upstream by one of the M.ImputedValue_* methods. Designed for use in transformation pipelines.

output_classes.description: The resulting value (original if non-missing, otherwise imputed)

input_roles.name: imputed_value
input_roles.description: Pre-computed replacement value (from an M.ImputedValue_* method)

_design_note: This method has no imputation_method configuration. The strategy is determined by which M.ImputedValue_* method is upstream in the transformation pipeline. This makes each step independently testable and auditable.
